abstract: We study satellite security and intrusion detection for GNSS signals.
Anomaly detection methods for satellite communications are evaluated on synthetic traffic.
GNSS spoofing and jamming countermeasures are assessed for space systems.
Non-terrestrial networks require secure routing across LEO constellations.
A survey of cybersecurity for satellite ground stations highlights intrusion detection gaps.
Learning-based intrusion detection improves resilience for spaceborne networks.
